summary: Implementation-local C decomp/matching improvements across miscellaneous menu translation units under src/melee/mn, with review-driven cleanup for CSSAllData placement, mndiagram .sdata2 ordering anchors, and typed animation table access.

text_corpus.jsonl: bot report lists fn_80247510, fn_802487A8, fn_80248A78 improvements

what_changed: Touched 11 files under src/melee/mn, mostly implementation C files for miscellaneous menu screens.
Improved matching for character select, data delete, diagram, event, info, snapshot, sound, sound test, and vibration menu code without shared header or build-system churn according to PR body.
Introduced CSSAllData as a file-scope typedef in mncharsel.c after review flagged an inline function-local struct definition.
Adjusted mndiagram constant-pool/.sdata2 ordering approach after review: author reports a separate order_sdata2 helper and S32_TO_F32 replaced a raw bias literal.
Adjusted mndiagram popup animation table typing after review: author reports call sites use a typed table helper instead of casting mnDiagram_803EE728.
Verification reported by PR body: clang-format, tools/check main.py, ninja, ninja dol_diff, ninja changes_all, structured report sweep with regressions=0.
Bot report showed 4 new matches and 30 improvements in unmatched items, including mnSoundTest_8024BEE0 and mndiagram .sdata2 reaching 100%.

smart_moves.text: Kept the PR scoped to implementation-local menu translation units and avoided shared header/build-system churn.
evidence_refs: human_pr_text.md: Scope and PR Shape sections

smart_moves.text: Responded to type-shape review by moving a recovered aggregate typedef to file scope so the function body uses a shared typedef rather than defining a struct inline.
evidence_refs: review_comments.md: Fix this at the top of the file, not the function body
human_pr_text.md: Addressed review comments in 1dfed6ae4

smart_moves.text: For mndiagram .sdata2 ordering, isolated ordering anchors into a dedicated static helper instead of leaving dead literal anchors inside the functional body.

decomp_lessons.lesson: When a recovered temporary struct models a shared data layout used by a function, prefer a file-scope typedef over defining the struct inside the function body.
evidence_refs: review_comments.md: mncharsel.c reviewer comment
raw_diff: CSSAllData typedef added near top of mncharsel.c
human_pr_text.md: CSSAllData moved to file scope

decomp_lessons.lesson: For unavoidable .sdata2 constant-pool ordering anchors, keep the hack isolated and documented in a separate static helper instead of mixing dead anchors into normal function logic.
evidence_refs: review_comments.md: reviewer suggested order_sdata2 helper
human_pr_text.md: author says anchors were split into order_sdata2

decomp_lessons.lesson: When a data table has a recoverable type, update the declaration or provide typed access instead of casting at the call site.
evidence_refs: review_comments.md: Change the type declaration of mnDiagram_803EE728 instead of casting
human_pr_text.md: Reworked diagram popup animation table typing

naming_conventions.convention: Use a semantic TU-local typedef such as CSSAllData when the aggregate layout is evidenced by neighboring fields and repeated access, rather than leaving a function-local anonymous struct.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: typedef struct CSSAllData with gnw_name, mode_info, icons
human_pr_text.md: kept mnCharSel_8025FDEC using the shared typedef

naming_conventions.convention: Helper name order_sdata2 was reviewer-suggested for a narrow .sdata2 order hack.
evidence_refs: review_comments.md: suggested static void order_sdata2(void)

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: Used local variable type/lifetime reshaping and PAD_STACK in menu functions to improve matching; evidence shows these edits in diff but does not explain each individual codegen reason.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: mndatadel.c PAD_STACK changes and added locals in fn_8024F318
raw_diff: mncharsel.c temporary pointers name_color, used_name_color, ddata, hval_f

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: Used .sdata2 ordering anchors for mndiagram constants; review required isolating them into a static helper and using S32_TO_F32 for the s32-to-f32 bias constant.
evidence_refs: review_comments.md: .sdata2 order hack helper suggestion
human_pr_text.md: raw bias literal replaced with S32_TO_F32

notes: The full raw diff is truncated in the loaded slice, so detailed file-by-file edits outside visible excerpts are summarized only from changed-file metadata and bot report.
Verification claims are taken from PR body and comments; no independent build or objdiff was run during intake.
Review intent is limited to the three loaded review comments and the later approval state; no unstated reviewer rationale is inferred.
The mndiagram final code is not fully shown in the diff excerpt, but the author explicitly reported the review resolutions in a later issue comment.

accepted_candidate_records.title: Recovered aggregate typedefs belong at file scope when used as a shared TU-local type
accepted_candidate_records.text: PR #2729 review rejected defining CSSAllData inside mnCharSel_8025FDEC and the author resolved it by moving CSSAllData to file scope while using the shared typedef in the function.
evidence_refs: review_comments.md: Fix this at the top of the file, not the function body
human_pr_text.md: Moved CSSAllData to file scope

accepted_candidate_records.title: Prefer typed declarations/accessors over call-site casts for recovered tables
accepted_candidate_records.text: PR #2729 review requested changing mnDiagram_803EE728's type declaration rather than casting it at the use site; the author reported reworking popup animation table typing so call sites use a typed table helper.
evidence_refs: review_comments.md: Change the type declaration of mnDiagram_803EE728 instead of casting
human_pr_text.md: typed table helper instead of casting

accepted_candidate_records.title: Isolate .sdata2 ordering anchors in a helper
accepted_candidate_records.text: PR #2729 review asked for mndiagram .sdata2 constant-pool anchors to live in a separate static order_sdata2 helper and to use S32_TO_F32 rather than a raw bias literal.
evidence_refs: review_comments.md: order_sdata2 helper suggestion
human_pr_text.md: anchors split into order_sdata2 and raw bias literal replaced

source_update_candidates.title: Recovered local structs should not be hidden inside function bodies when they are reusable TU types
source_update_candidates.text: Consider adding an example under typed access/naming standards: if a recovered aggregate layout is used as a stable TU-local type, define a named typedef at file scope instead of declaring a one-off struct inside a function body.
evidence_refs: review_comments.md: Fix this at the top of the file, not the function body
human_pr_text.md: Moved CSSAllData to file scope
source_update_candidates.reason: The review comment is concrete and reusable, but curator should decide whether it belongs as a global standard or only as a path-local lesson.

source_update_candidates.title: Isolate constant-pool/.sdata2 order hacks and use project macros for special literals
source_update_candidates.text: Consider adding a standards example: when constant-pool anchors are needed for .sdata2 ordering, isolate them in a small documented static helper such as order_sdata2 and prefer existing macros such as S32_TO_F32 over raw magic literals.
evidence_refs: review_comments.md: reviewer suggested order_sdata2 and S32_TO_F32
human_pr_text.md: author reports implementing this
source_update_candidates.reason: This is supported by review evidence and aligns with existing matching-tactics and literals standards, but should be curated before becoming a general rule.

source_update_candidates.title: mndiagram.c uses order_sdata2-style helper for .sdata2 ordering
source_update_candidates.text: PR #2729 indicates src/melee/mn/mndiagram.c needed .sdata2 ordering anchors for -1.0f and the s32-to-f32 bias, later isolated into order_sdata2 with S32_TO_F32.
evidence_refs: review_comments.md: .sdata2 order hack helper suggestion
human_pr_text.md: anchors split into order_sdata2
source_update_candidates.reason: May be useful as path-local context if future mndiagram edits encounter the same data-order issue.

rejection_notes: Do not generalize that all constant-pool anchors are acceptable; this PR shows a reviewed narrow exception with explicit matching context.

Do not infer that PAD_STACK/local lifetime tactics in the visible diff are preferred style; the PR evidence shows their presence and match improvements but not detailed justification for each instance.
Do not treat the changed files as having no remaining mismatches; bot report lists improvements and some new 100% items, not universal full matching.
